item.title: Provision Health Corp. dba PH Labs: Ocular Plus with Lutein, Zeaxanthin, and Omega 3-6-9; Dietary Supplement, 200 Capsules. Serving Size: 4 Capsules; Recall

item.brand: Provision Health Corp. dba PH Labs
item.product: Ocular Plus with Lutein, Zeaxanthin, and Omega 3-6-9; Dietary Supplement, 200 Capsules. Serving Size: 4 Capsules;
item.summary: Dietary supplement product Ocular Plus contains undeclared Yellow#5. Product details: Ocular Plus with Lutein, Zeaxanthin, and Omega 3-6-9; Dietary Supplement, 200 Capsules. Serving Size: 4 Capsules; Distributed by: L.A. Farmacia Natural, Burbank, CA 91504 UPC: PHF-C023
item.affectedPeople: Product was distributed to two local direct accounts. Both are local retail stores selling various vitamins and health products.
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 6,967 units across all lots
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
